name: PHYZ Holdings Inc.
summary: PHYZ Holdings Inc. provides various EC solutions for companies operating EC sites in Japan. The company provides operation services, including consulting, warehouse operations, and general worker dispatch services; logistics services comprising transportation of products between locations using mid- and large-sized vehicles; and delivery services using light vehicles. It also offers staffing, recruitment, and mail agency services. The company was formerly known as PHYZ Inc. and changed its name to PHYZ Holdings Inc. in October 2019. PHYZ Holdings Inc. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
